scripts.deploy: npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm test && npm run test:client && npm run build && npm run size-check && devvit upload
scripts.size-check: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const dir='dist/client';const lim=(+process.env.CLIENT_SIZE_LIMIT_MB||16)*1048576;let t=0;const walk=d=>{for(const e of fs.readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true})){const f=p.join(d,e.name);if(e.isDirectory())walk(f);else t+=fs.statSync(f).size;}};walk(dir);const mb=(t/1048576).toFixed(2),max=(lim/1048576).toFixed(0);if(t>lim){console.error('size-check: dist/client is '+mb+' MB, over the '+max+' MB limit');process.exit(1);}console.log('size-check: dist/client OK ('+mb+' MB, limit '+max+' MB)');"
